name: medlearn
description: Submit explicit MedLearnHandoff Project Sources through the authenticated MedLearn workflow.

interface.longDescription: Reads an explicitly selected MedLearnHandoff from the current Work context and submits it through the authenticated MedLearn intake pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Read the explicitly selected MedLearnHandoff Project Source and submit it with the MedLearn tool.
Do not infer or add evidence that is absent from the selected Handoff.
